author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #8 is happening this Wednesday!  

The Atlas Brew is a new Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel 

In these events we will talk about different Star Atlas topics that the community will decide beforehand on ⁠No Access channel, as well as theorycrafting and even helping newcomers who need a little bit of guidance in the Star Atlas Metaverse 

This week's main topics: Titan Ships & Reports + Lore: How are Titan ships going to impact the Star Atlas metaverse? Why are they important? / Deep dive into Wenn's reports and mind 

See you all on Wednesday at 22:00 UTC!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/960943125872930888
